    "Missing product listing page and project notes required to verify compliance of the proposed shortcut",
    "Inability to verify compliance with NEC Art. 408, 110.26, and 200.4 without manufacturer instructions"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the shortcut installation immediately",
    "Request and review the manufacturer's product listing page and specific project notes",
    "Verify working clearances per NEC 110.26 and neutral/ground configurations per NEC 200.4 before proceeding"

  "rationale": "The crew is proposing a shortcut during an active panelboard installation, but critical submittal documentation (product listing and project notes) is missing. Without this documentation, it is impossible to verify if the shortcut violates manufacturer instructions (NEC 110.3(B)), working clearances (NEC 110.26), or neutral conductor rules (NEC 200.4). Work must be paused on this specific task until documentation is provided.",

    "NEC Article 408",
    "NEC Section 110.3(B)",
    "NEC Section 110.26",
    "NEC Section 200.4"
  ]
